subject: Remove chef for asdctool
commit_message:
Remove chef for asdctool

- Remove chef from asdctool config and handle executions through kubernetes resources

Issue-ID: SDC-4700
Change-Id: I09dcf729c9172f30d4f83cf36705628856cd8915
Signed-off-by: Anamika Khantwal <anamika.khantwal@accenture.com>
